payload.description:
Cycle 2+ optimizer synthesis evaluations still store both baseline_evaluation_id and current_baseline_evaluation_id, but the dashboard evaluation/task card renders baseline information inconsistently after the first cycle.

Acceptance criteria:
- Evaluation cards use canonical baseline_evaluation_id and current_baseline_evaluation_id fields.
- Later-cycle optimizer evaluations show both original baseline and current best baseline when both exist.
- Regression coverage prevents future drift between stage evidence and evaluation-card baseline rendering.
payload.title: Restore dual-baseline rendering for optimizer evaluation cards
